title: BEM-840 execute 839 next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-23 | 19:52 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if not missing and status_in=='triad_present':
    status='triad_present_process_protocol_next'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    # Hard repair: direct result-writer probe. It does not fake Claude response; it proves queue processor path.
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 hard proof for workflow_dispatch_results after BEM-839 missing proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results status exists'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    # Queue Claude dispatcher and add explicit mailbox request with required output name.
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_runtime_and_response_request.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-840 | Claude runtime and response request'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: read latest architecture/protocol request and respond to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_response.md.'+sep+'Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+'Also explain why earlier mailbox response was missing if repository evidence shows it.'+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_dispatch_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 dispatch Claude dispatcher to prove runtime state and real response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state and real Claude response'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_real_response_request.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-840 | Real Claude response request'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide real response for multi-agent architecture protocol. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_response.md.'+sep+'Required fields: Decision, risks, proposed protocol changes, final recommendation.'+sep+'Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 retry real Claude response after dispatch/runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response; blocker files do not count'
else:
    status='unknown_bem839_state'
    next_action='re-read BEM-839 and proof triad'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':status_in,'bem839_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_execute_bem839_next_repair.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_execute_bem839_next_repair.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Execute BEM-839 Next Repair | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_execute_bem839_next_repair.json','governance/reports/bem840_execute_bem839_next_repair.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-839 next repair directly: queued the missing-proof dispatch/request without creating another route-only task')
"""
No issue comments.
